svg.text: Nagahara province, Crab Clan lands - seat of County Magistrate Hida no Reiji Hajime

g.text: (was an Ebisu shrine - one altar remains)
Yasuki sea salt at every door - never salt that has
touched the river. Hajime sets them with his own hand,
renewing them after every rain, main gate last. A ward
found scattered on a dry day is the worst kind of omen.
